header: Edit your pages right where they live
description: Desiderio's Visual Editor turns the frontend into the editing surface — click any of the 255 elements and write inline. Editors stop guessing, reviews stop dragging, and the backend round-trip disappears.

image.title: Editing inline in the Desiderio Visual Editor
image.alternative: Desiderio Visual Editor with inline editing active on a content element in the frontend.
image.description: Screenshot of the Desiderio Visual Editor in TYPO3.
